prompt: An abstract network of human-like figures connected by glowing lines, forming a complex web. Each figure is surrounded by neighboring figures that visibly have more connections than itself, yet this condition holds for every figure in the network simultaneously. No text, no numbers, no symbols. Style: minimalistic but detailed, soft glowing connections, dark background, subtle depth of field, slightly surreal atmosphere. The contradiction should emerge naturally from the structure, creating a quiet sense of impossibility.
visual_logic: Each node is surrounded by neighbors with higher connectivity, creating the perception that others are more connected due to network structure bias.
